{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321135533EBC9190E162AFE060D76"}"},"total":1598},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7285641745068786492","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"1.主题还是比较新颖的。双系统流，弊端是有些地方有点重复，也无可厚非。
2.人物主角智商还在线，思维在线。人物性格还算立体，没那么抽象。尔虞我诈，自私自利，符合故事中的社会背景。
3.剧情还不错，也有吸引人的地方。比如青州平判事件。魔道一方面稍微没有立体感，目的手段等显得不是特别坏，还没蛮夷三城血祭狠。整体已经很可以了。
4.感情戏不乱，目前没有崩的迹象。男主并没有见一个爱一个，不圣母，不滥情。可能作者后续会逐渐把这方面完善。
5.有点不好的地方就是伏笔细节方面把控较弱。有些人出现的比较突然。故事中断突然出现有点像乱入。
整体来说这本书非常好了，可以带脑子看，也可以休闲看。比较推荐。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696321482,"group_id":"7219338791452937254","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5tv45PcAdVzvCqvK2Hefkkv+sFGISu72cCVTGAFgo+h","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3500435929045880","user_name":"认认真真的罗队长"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3500435929045880","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7219338791452937254","book_info":{"abstract":"周贞文穿越成高武世界的大荒王朝，成为权倾朝野的内阁首辅。
因其儒雅清俊，手段狠辣，被人成为“青衣阎罗”。
女帝初登基，皇太后临朝称制，掌控大权，为了收回权柄，女帝决定除掉周贞文，向皇太后证明自身的能力。
然而，当女帝绑定模拟器后，发现可以模拟他人的人生。
模拟皇太后，发现皇太后野心极大，不满足于垂帘听政，打算谋朝篡位，成为女帝。
模拟大理寺卿，发现此人居然是别国内奸，一直在分裂朝廷势力，打算里应外合，进行谋反。
而那个被自己视作国之奸佞的周贞文，居然是大大的忠臣？
当模拟周贞文人生轨迹之后，女帝彻底震惊了！
一直权倾朝野的青衣首辅，竟有冠绝天下的超凡武艺？
一直只懂权谋之术的读书人，竟有兵仙之能？
所作所为，居然都是为国为民？
那一刻，女帝泪崩了。
“周首辅，才是我大荒国的国之栋梁啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7d0c19f2e385a452cb538791dd040798","author":"轮回见","author_id":"","book_id":"7219338791452937254","book_name":"满朝上下皆奸臣，忠良竟是我自己","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":513,"name":"高武世界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=513&name=高武世界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7223058578943246908","read_count":"15033","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2002695"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"913","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,女帝,架空,高武世界,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c6d84d439991a8893e270eb77856a6f1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256533&x-signature=BWvFJAeo0nds93aygQ%2BPKF2ELfQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"892442964146781","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.46975
